channel.title: Bell's Brewery - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Beer America Friends – Ep. 98
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We have quite a few faithful followers of Beer America TV and we appreciate everyone of you, trust me when I say that! As many of you know, we’re hoping to turn this little hobby of ours into a real Beer TV travel series –  we’re still working out the details on that one . […]

The post Beer America Friends – Ep. 98 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bell’s Brewery – Oberon, Ep. 73
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As the summer starts to wind down, we wanted to share an American Craft beer for a warm sunny day, Oberon. Oberon is an American wheat ale brewed with Saaz hops. It’s spicy and fruity, but extremely well balanced. If you’ve not had beer from Bell’s Brewery, we suggest you give them a try . […]

The post Bell’s Brewery – Oberon, Ep. 73 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bell’s Brewery, Part 2: Third Coast and HopSlam Ale, Ep. 49
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV unleashes part two of a two-part series discussing Bell’s Brewery . This time it’s all about the hops with HopSlam Ale and the smoothness of their Third Coast Old Ale. More fine examples as to why you should try the beer from Bell’s Brewery if you can get your hands on it.

The post Bell’s Brewery, Part 2: Third Coast and HopSlam Ale, Ep. 49 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bell’s Brewery, Part 1: Porter and Two Hearted IPA, Ep. 48
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week, Beer America TV unleashes part one of a two part series discussing Bell’s Brewery. In this episode, we taste the Bell’s Porter and Two Hearted IPA, both outstanding in their own right . Located in Galesburg, Michigan, Bell’s has been slowly expanding its market, and if you can’t get it now, keep your […]

The post Bell’s Brewery, Part 1: Porter and Two Hearted IPA, Ep. 48 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
